creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason W. Bacon from comment #2)
> I think it was fairly recent.  I was using PORTVERSION with nobody
> complaining for years, but started getting dinged for it maybe the past 4 or
> 5 months.

Grr...
If that true; look for some ~150 pr(1)'s headed to bugzilla.
Cause that's about how many I'm currently maintaining, and
I'll want to handle it in one giant batch to get it
over with.

Sigh...


Thanks for taking the time to reply, Jason!

--Chris
